Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco  have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Le Paris SG n'a remporté qu'un seul de ses quatre derniers matches de Ligue 1 face à Lorient.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Arsenal vs Fulham - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Journée 35
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Osasuna vs Barcelone - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 34e journée
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona  and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. Barcelona lost their last LaLiga away game against Osasuna 4-2 in September 2024, ending an eight-game unbeaten run on the road against them ; they have not lost consecutive away league matches against the Navarrese side since 1984.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Osasuna n'a remporté qu'une seule de ses 11 dernières rencontres de Liga avec Barcelone et connaît actuellement sa plus longue série sans cage inviolée contre les Blaugrana dans la compétition.

beIN SPORTS 9.title: اليوم الأول - الفروسية - سيف سمو الأمير 2026 - السباق
beIN SPORTS 9.desc: يعود سباق جائزة صاحب السمو الأمير الوالد 2026 في الفترة من 9 إلى 10 يناير 2026، ليجمع بين سباقات الخيول الأصيلة من الدرجة الأولى على مدار يومين من الإثارة التنافسية، ويضم تشكيلة دولية قوية، ومسابقات عالية المخاطر، وأجواء متميزة تحتفي برياضة النخبة، والتقاليد، والمكانة في تقويم السباقات في قطر.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Villarreal vs Levante - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 34e journée
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Villarreal have won 66.7% of its matches against Levante in LaLiga, the highest percentage of victories against the same opponent with at least 15 encounters in its entire history in the top division. Levante UD have lost seven of their last eight away games against Villarreal in LaLiga, a stark contrast to their first five visits to the Estadio de la Cerámica in the competition, where they picked up points in three of those matches.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Villarreal a remporté 66,7% de ses matchs contre Levante en Liga, soit le pourcentage de victoires le plus élevé contre le même adversaire avec au moins 15 rencontres dans toute son histoire en première division.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco  have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Sporting Braga vs Fribourg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Demi-finales - Aller
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Il s'agit de la toute première rencontre européenne entre Braga et Fribourg : l'équipe portugaise a remporté cinq des 13 matchs européens majeurs contre des équipes allemandes, même si tous les cinq ont participé à des matches de phase de groupes ;

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Valence vs Atlético De Madrid - Liga espagnole 2025/26 - 34e journée

Atlético de Madrid have lost only one of their last 10 away LaLiga matches against Valencia, a 3-0 defeat in September 2023, having lost six of the previous nine.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le Valencia CF a perdu ses quatre derniers matches de Liga contre l'Atlético de Madrid et n'a jamais perdu cinq matchs consécutifs de haut niveau contre lui dans son histoire.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Deportivo Alavés vs Athletic Bilbao - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
beIN SPORTS 3.title: ديبورتيفو ألافيس vs أتليتيك بيلباو - الدوري الإسباني 2025/26 - الأسبوع 34
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: فاز ديبورتيفو ألافيس بواحدة فقط من آخر ثماني مباريات له في الدوري الإسباني ضد أتلتيك كلوب، حيث فاز 1-0 في آخر لقاء له في الدوري في سبتمبر 2025. حقق فريق فيتوريا انتصارات متتالية في الدوري ضد أتلتيك كلوب في تاريخه مرة واحدة فقط، وذلك بين فبراير وأكتوبر 2020. حصل أتليتيك كلوب على نقاط في كل من مبارياته الثلاث الأخيرة خارج أرضه في الدوري ضد ديبورتيفو ألافيس؛
beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Deportivo Alavés vs Athletic Bilbao - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 34ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Deportivo Alavés have won only one of their last eight LaLiga matches against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in their most recent league meeting in September 2025. The Vitoria side have only once managed back-to-back league wins against Athletic Club in their history, doing so between February and October 2020.
